acceptance_targets: [ch03_f05] PASS if at least one line each from Vera, Lena, and Cora has distinct lexical/rhythmic markers and remains attributable without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines still read like the same aphoristic voice in rotation.

[ch03_f08] PASS if the revised line communicates the same pressure using varied concrete language and does not repeat a single abstract noun in three successive short sentences; FAIL if the triadic keyword loop remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least one line each from Vera, Lena, and Cora has distinct lexical/rhythmic markers and remains attributable without dialogue tags; FAIL if the lines still read like the same aphoristic voice in rotation.
findings.problem: Supporting voices drift toward interchangeable aphoristic punch-lines (for example: 'Usually is fake,' 'Narrow saves time,' 'choice with luggage,' 'folded map'). The shared cadence blurs idiolect separation and weakens dialogue realism.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retune dialogue in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:171, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:183, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:247 so Vera stays procedural/command-driven, Lena stays younger and colloquial, and Cora stays service-floor concrete rather than proverb-heavy.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised line communicates the same pressure using varied concrete language and does not repeat a single abstract noun in three successive short sentences; FAIL if the triadic keyword loop remains.
findings.problem: Mechanical lexical repetition flattens the admonition beat: 'Grocery arithmetic. Tuition arithmetic. Sleep arithmetic.' repeats the same abstract noun three times, creating token-loop texture instead of character-specific speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Cora's warning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:259 with concrete diner-floor and household imagery (for example bills, shifts, missed sleep) while avoiding repeated reuse of the same abstract keyword.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
